title: ProviderListMethod
description: Contract for provider.list JSON-RPC method. Returns the read-only provider registry: all built-in providers with their metadata and path candidates.

ProviderListRequest.title: ProviderListRequest
ProviderListRequest.description: Params for provider.list. Empty — no params needed.

ProviderListPathCandidate.title: ProviderListPathCandidate
ProviderListPathCandidate.description: A single path candidate for a provider.

relativePath.description: Path relative to project root (project scope) or home dir (global scope). Global paths use ~ prefix.

scope.description: Whether this candidate applies to a project or the user's global environment

purpose.description: Role of this path: detect=presence check, skills=skills directory, config=config dir, commands=commands dir

priority.description: Ordering priority; higher values take precedence

source.description: Whether this candidate is a built-in default, user override, or custom provider path

verificationStatus.description: Confidence level: verified=confirmed from docs, assumed=convention-based, experimental=uncertain

ProviderListProvider.title: ProviderListProvider
ProviderListProvider.description: Full provider registry entry for one provider.

key.description: Stable provider key (e.g. generic_agents, claude, codex)

iconKey.description: Icon key used to look up the provider icon SVG, or null if not set

status.description: Skillbox support level for this provider

isAvailable.description: Whether this provider is available for use. Derived from support status: true for supported/experimental, false for unsupported/disabled. Not a user preference — override storage is deferred.

canCreateStructure.description: Whether Skillbox can create the provider directory structure in a project

hasGlobalLevel.description: Whether this provider has a global-level skills location

candidates.description: All path candidates for this provider, ordered by priority descending

ProviderListResponse.title: ProviderListResponse
ProviderListResponse.description: List of all registered providers in the registry. Errors: database_error (1004) if DB unavailable.

providers.description: All built-in providers ordered by registry insertion order
